factoRverse 0.4.8

Define the mmaf_parameters S4 Class

Source: R/class_definitions.R
mmaf_parameters-class.Rd

S4 class to represent a set of configurations for the MMAF portfolio construction method.

Slots

mmaf_method

A character indicating the MMAF method to be used. Must be one of 'top_down' or 'bottom_up'.

top_down_proxy_port_method

A character indicating the method to be used for constructing the top-down proxy portfolio. Must be one of 'ew', 'rp', 'hrp', 'cs' or 'sw' if mmaf_method is 'top_down' and NULL if mmaf_method is 'bottom_up'.

mmaf_group_col

A character string representing the MMAF group to which the assets belong. This is used to group assets when constructing micro and macro portfolios. It must be a length 1 character.

micro_port_config

An object of class mmaf_sub_port_config representing the configuration for constructing micro portfolios.

macro_port_config

An object of class mmaf_sub_port_config representing the configuration for constructing macro portfolios.

Developed by Paulo Guimaraes.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
